Interface Server

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20Server, AsyncApi21Server, AsyncApi22Server, AsyncApi23Server, AsyncApi24Server, AsyncApi25Server, AsyncApi26Server, AsyncApi2xServer, AsyncApi30Server, AsyncApi31Server, AsyncApi3xServer, AsyncApiServer, OpenApi30Server, OpenApi31Server, OpenApi32Server, OpenApi3xServer, OpenApiServer, OpenRpc13Server, OpenRpc14Server, OpenRpc1xServer, OpenRpcServer
